info.title: OpenBarber API
info.description:
REST API for the OpenBarber barber shop booking platform.

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a JWT Bearer token. Obtain it via `POST /api/auth/authenticate`.

## Roles
- **CUSTOMER** – browse shops, book appointments, write reviews
- **ENTERPRISE** – manage shop, employees, services, appointments
- **ADMIN** – full access

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Register, login, token refresh, password reset, email verification
